noProgram: No program is set up yet.
projectedNote: Projected sessions assume every session between now and then gets completed — the rotation follows what you complete, not the date, so a missed day shifts everything after it.

dayDetail.nothingLogged: Nothing was logged this day — the session shifted forward, nothing was lost.
dayDetail.notPartOfPhase: This date isn't part of this phase.

import.duplicateSessionId: Two sessions share the id "{{sessionId}}" — session ids must be unique.
import.unknownRotationSession: Rotation references session id "{{rotationId}}", which no session in this file defines.
import.exerciseNotInLibrary: Exercise id "{{exerciseId}}" in session "{{sessionId}}" doesn't exist in the Library.
import.substitutionListsSelf: Exercise "{{exerciseId}}" in session "{{sessionId}}" lists itself as a substitution.
import.duplicateSubstitution: Exercise "{{exerciseId}}" in session "{{sessionId}}" lists substitution "{{substitutionId}}" twice.
import.substitutionNotInLibrary: Substitution "{{substitutionId}}" for exercise "{{exerciseId}}" in session "{{sessionId}}" doesn't exist in the Library.
import.weekdayIsTrainingDay: $t({{weekdayKey}}) is a training day — it can't also carry an activity.
import.missingFrontMatter: Missing front matter — expected a "---" block at the top of the file.
import.noSessionsFound: No sessions found — expected at least one "## Session: <id>" section.
import.sessionMissingColumn: Session "{{sectionId}}" table is missing the "{{column}}" column.
import.invalidRange: Session "{{sectionId}}": row for "{{exerciseId}}" has an invalid Range "{{value}}" — expected "min-max".
import.invalidWeights: Session "{{sectionId}}": row for "{{exerciseId}}" has invalid Weights "{{value}}" — expected "start/max/step" with "-" for null.
import.nonNumericField: Session "{{sectionId}}": row for "{{exerciseId}}" has a non-numeric Sets or Rest value.
import.unrecognizedWeekdayHeading: Activity heading "{{weekdayName}}" isn't a recognized weekday name (Monday … Sunday).
import.activityMissingItems: Activity "{{weekdayName}}" has no items — expected at least one "- " bullet line.
